'''Relekin Confidential''' was a collections agency based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Danadine]]. When the company was sold to the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]], Relekin become the primary collections agency for the criminal syndicate, presumably using coercive methods that would have been shunned in its earlier, supposedly legitimate form.

{{Company-stub}}
